metadata.policy: Automation-curated batch decisions stay bronze and are imported as automation_curated or needs_expert_review records, not gold or expert-reviewed labels.
metadata.provenance_rule: imports append review provenance and preserve existing evidence.sources
metadata.unlabeled_inclusion_rule: append all unlabeled queue rows even when ranked below the export cutoff
